title: CFDMethod entity (ONT-E-12)
description: A CFD numerical method (RANS / URANS / LES / DES / DDES / IDDES / DNS / Hybrid). Composes entity.base.schema.json via allOf + $ref + unevaluatedProperties: false (NEVER additionalProperties — Pitfall #1). method_class is the canonical discriminator; equations and governing_assumptions document the method's physics-of-flow scope. Used by SimulationCase.cfd_method_ref. Schema version: 0.1.0.

type.description: Discriminator. MUST be the literal string 'CFDMethod'.

method_class.description: Canonical CFD method class. RANS = Reynolds-Averaged Navier-Stokes (steady); URANS = unsteady RANS; LES = Large-Eddy Simulation; DES/DDES/IDDES = Detached-Eddy Simulation variants; DNS = Direct Numerical Simulation; Hybrid = method blending two or more of the above (e.g. RANS-LES zonal); Other = anything outside this taxonomy (escape hatch — discouraged).

equations.description: Optional free-text description of the governing equations (≥20 chars). Example: 'incompressible Navier-Stokes with Boussinesq buoyancy approximation; energy equation in temperature form'.

governing_assumptions.description: Optional list of governing assumptions (e.g. ['incompressible', 'steady-state', 'no shock waves', 'no free-surface effects']).

validation_status.description: Optional. Validation maturity per project usage. validated = compared against reference data with acceptable error; partially_validated = some validation exists but gaps remain; exploratory = research-grade, not yet validated; deprecated = no longer recommended.

typical_applications.description: Optional list of typical application regimes (e.g. ['external aerodynamics, low Mach', 'internal flow with heat transfer', 'high-fidelity wake-resolved rotor simulations']).
